title: 🌐 Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global
display_time: 10:00 AM–7:00 PM local time each day
summary: Global GO Fest weekend with special raids, habitats, bonuses, and challenges.
description: Global event weekend. Stored as an all-day banner so it does not block the hourly calendar grid.

title: ⚡ Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration
summary: A rotating anniversary celebration featuring costumed Pikachu, research, raids, and a GO Pass.
description: The event runs from July 13 at 10:00 AM through July 20 at 8:00 PM local time. Open the official page for the rotation schedule and bonuses.

title: ⚔️ Raichu Super Mega Raid Day
summary: Mega Raichu X and Mega Raichu Y debut during a three-hour Super Mega Raid Day.
description:
FEATURED BOSSES: Mega Raichu X and Mega Raichu Y
SHINY: Raichu may be Shiny
FREE PASSES: Up to six from Gym Photo Discs
NOTE: Counter recommendations should be added after the final boss typings and battle data are verified.

title: 🎂 Professor Willow’s Birthday Research
summary: Birthday research featuring Professor Willow’s assistant Pikachu.
description: Free Timed Research is available during the event. Research rewards include encounters with Professor Willow’s assistant Pikachu, a Lucky Egg, a Star Piece, and more.

title: 🎉 Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary Edition
summary: A GO Fest Global Challenge–powered anniversary event.
description: This event can receive upgraded bonuses when Trainers complete the required GO Fest Global Challenges.

title: ⏰ Willow Birthday Research Deadline
summary: Complete the Timed Research and claim all rewards before it expires.
description: Professor Willow’s Birthday Timed Research expires at 8:00 PM local time.

title: ☄️ Ozone Ascent
summary: Complete Timed Research for a Meteorite, a Rayquaza encounter, and more.
description: Free and paid Timed Research are available. The research expires Sunday, July 26 at 8:00 PM local time.

title: ⏰ Ozone Ascent Research Deadline
summary: Finish the Ozone Ascent Timed Research and claim all rewards.
description: Both the free and paid Ozone Ascent Timed Research expire at 8:00 PM local time.

title: 🧚 Choose Your Path: Fairy Trail
summary: Choose an Explore, Catch, or Battle path during this seasonal research week.
description: Choose Your Path: Fairy Trail runs from July 28 at 10:00 AM to August 3 at 8:00 PM local time.

title: 🎟️ GO Pass: Unlimited Points Weekend
summary: The daily GO Point limit is removed for the weekend.
description: There is no daily limit on GO Points from August 1 at 12:00 AM through August 2 at 11:59 PM local time.

title: ⏰ GO Pass: July Ends
summary: Last chance to collect GO Points and rank up the July GO Pass.
description: GO Pass: July ends at 10:00 AM local time.

title: 🥚 August Hatch Day
summary: The date is official; the featured Pokémon and exact event window are still pending.
description: Save the date. This entry will be updated when Pokémon GO publishes the full Hatch Day announcement.

title: 🌿 Choose Your Path: Venom and Vines
summary: Choose an Explore, Catch, or Battle path during this seasonal research week.
description: Choose Your Path: Venom and Vines runs from August 11 at 10:00 AM to August 17 at 8:00 PM local time.

title: 🟢 Nickit Community Day
summary: Nickit appears more frequently with Community Day bonuses and an exclusive evolution move.
description:
FEATURED POKÉMON: Nickit
SHINY: Available
LURE BONUS: Extended through 9:00 PM local time
Open the official announcement for full bonuses and the evolution deadline.

title: 💧 Ultra Unlock: Water Festival
summary: A GO Fest Global Challenge–powered Water Festival.
description: This event can receive upgraded bonuses when Trainers complete the required GO Fest Global Challenges.

title: ⚔️ Ultra Unlock: Super Mega Raid Day
summary: A six-hour Super Mega Raid Day; the featured boss is still pending.
description: The event date and time are confirmed. The boss, counters, movesets, shiny status, and CP values will be added after the full announcement.
